task_completion.description: Agent opens and reads the transient alerts document.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window displaying the contents of ~/Documents/transient_alerts.txt with the four AT2026 targets.

task_completion.description: Agent captures 60-second Luminance light frames for the valid targets.
task_completion.visual_evidence: KStars/Ekos capture module configured for 60s exposure and Luminance filter, or a file manager/terminal showing FITS files located in ~/Observations/AT2026a/fresh/, ~/Observations/AT2026c/fresh/, and ~/Observations/AT2026d/fresh/.

task_completion.description: Agent retrieves 0.5-degree DSS2 archival images with the 'cool' palette for the valid targets.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager, image viewer, or terminal showing dss2.png files in ~/Observations/AT2026a/archive/, ~/Observations/AT2026c/archive/, and ~/Observations/AT2026d/archive/, or a tool/script downloading 0.5-degree DSS2 images with the 'cool' palette.

task_completion.description: Agent correctly identifies AT2026b as violating the declination limit and skips imaging it.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Absence of image captures for AT2026b. There should be no FITS or PNG files created for AT2026b in the ~/Observations/ directory.

task_completion.description: Agent generates a summary report documenting the final status of all four targets.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal showing the contents of ~/Observations/triage_report.txt, specifically verifying that AT2026a, AT2026c, and AT2026d are marked as 'Imaged', and AT2026b is marked as 'Skipped'.

integrity.description: Verifies the agent used KStars/Ekos to capture the light frames.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the KStars GUI, Ekos capture module, or INDI control panel being actively used, rather than just using terminal commands to create mock FITS files.

integrity.description: Verifies the agent actually downloaded the archival images.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing a browser, script execution, or KStars DSS download tool fetching the DSS2 images, rather than creating fake PNGs locally.

integrity.description: Verifies the agent evaluated the targets based on the alerts file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is seen opening transient_alerts.txt and checking the coordinates before writing the report, rather than magically knowing which targets to skip.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The four targets and their validities based on the Dec > -30 limit are: AT2026a (valid, Dec 41.4244), AT2026b (invalid, Dec -37.2083), AT2026c (valid, Dec 54.3489), and AT2026d (valid, Dec 47.1950). AT2026b must be skipped and marked as 'Skipped' in the report, while the other three must be imaged and marked as 'Imaged'. The archival images should be 0.5-degree DSS2 images with the 'cool' palette.
